Our Philosophy

Ancestral Integrity Meets Elite Performance

FLINT bridges the gap between elite performance nutrition and everyday grocery convenience. We stripped out the fillers, the gums, and the artificial sweeteners — and built something grounded in real food.

🔥

The Signature Crunch

Light, airy, ultra-satisfying. No chewy fatigue — just a clean, premium snap with every bite.

🥩

Elite Bioavailability

Egg white crisps, grass-fed whey isolate, and bovine collagen. No soy. No bloat. Just real animal protein.

🍯

Whole-Food Integrity

Bound with almond butter, grass-fed ghee, and raw honey. Sweetened by nature, not a lab.

Our Bars

Three flavours. One mission. Ditch chewy fatigue for good.

Flavour 01

Salted Honey & Grass-Fed Butter

Browned ghee and raw Manuka honey create a natural butter-toffee depth. The metabolic priming bar for morning fuel and rapid recovery — whey protein with the clean, performance fats of grass-fed ghee.

6.3gFat
11.8gCarbs
195kcal

Flavour 02

Dark Cacao & Sea Salt

Cacao nibs alongside raw cacao powder create a double-crunch with sophisticated bitterness. An antioxidant-rich, lower-sugar variant powered by bovine collagen and almond butter — our most refined bar.

7.2gFat
8.9gCarbs
189kcal

5-Pack · 50g per bar

Flavour 03

Maple & Toasted Pecan

Pecans toasted in maple syrup create a candied effect that mimics high-end granola. A hearty breakfast-profile bar combining egg white protein and the rustic richness of tree nuts and pure Canadian maple.

6.9gFat
11.2gCarbs
